shared_properties: HUD icons keep an 8px pixel font scale so they match the rest of the interface.
Torch palette stays within dungeon amber and dark ember tones for immediate health readability.
Outline weight remains 1px to hold clarity against the dark backdrop.
differences: Atlas is 16x8px with one filled torch frame and one empty torch frame in a single row.
Filled state emphasizes #F5A623 while the spent state drops to #3D2B00.
The art is authored for three repeated instances aligned in the top-left HUD cluster.

context.usage: HP display atlas used to show full and empty torch icons at the top-left corner.

shape.silhouette: Compact torch icon with a bright flame cap and dark handle.
shape.collision_read: UI-only asset with no collision meaning.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas size is exactly 16x8px with two 8x8px frames.
Filled and empty states remain distinguishable when three icons are placed in a 32px-wide HUD row.
The darkest ember pixels keep enough contrast against #0D0D0F to remain visible in the HUD corner.

reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds HUD contrast, muted dungeon palette, and low-saturation screen overlays for the active widget.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Texture-atlas-backed UI image instances spawned inside an HUD node.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer during the Loading state and keep the atlas handle in an HUD resource.
runtime_notes: Use Bevy 0.13 with ImagePlugin::default_nearest() so every asset stays pixel-perfect at 4x upscale.
Anchor the icon row to whole pixels at the top-left safe area.
Swap atlas indices instead of tinting one sprite so full and empty states stay deterministic.
